description_long: This is a modern hillside house complex featuring two main structures connected by a patio and a swimming pool. The primary building is a two-story residence with a gable roof, large windows, and a spacious balcony overlooking the sloped terrain. The secondary structure, likely a garage or guest house, sits closer to the street and is also topped with a gable roof. The property is set on a steeply inclined lot, with terraced landscaping and retaining walls supporting the buildings. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of wood, concrete, and glass, giving the house a contemporary yet natural look. The overall design emphasizes open views, outdoor living spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story hillside house with a gable roof, large windows, and a secondary structure, set on a steeply sloped lot with a pool and terraced landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, secondary structure, pool, and the steep slope of the terrain.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the entryway, driveway, and the alignment of both buildings along the lot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the rear of the main house, the pool area, and the terraced landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the secondary structure and the slope leading up to the main house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, steps leading up from the driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
